results.rendered_html: śata—rūpā (ā), f. N. of the daughter and wife of Brahmā (her incestuous intercourse with her father produced Manu Svāyambhuva, but some Purāṇas make Śata-rūpā the wife not mother of the first Manu),  Hariv. ;  BṛĀrUp. , Sch.;  Pur.
